framework.title: Intelligent Conversational AI and Crime Analytics Platform
framework.mission: Enable investigators, analysts, supervisors, and policymakers to query crime records, discover relationships, and generate preventive intelligence with transparent evidence trails.

core_tasks.label: Crime pattern discovery
core_tasks.prompt: Run crime pattern discovery across accessible records. Identify repeat clusters by district, crime type, modus operandi, season, and event context. Return evidence FIRs and prevention leads.

core_tasks.label: Criminal network analysis
core_tasks.prompt: Run criminal network analysis. Identify linked suspects, victims, locations, accounts, repeat offender groups, bridge nodes, and money-trail relationships from accessible records.

core_tasks.label: Socio-demographic crime insights
core_tasks.prompt: Run socio-demographic crime insights. Summarize age, gender, socio-economic, urbanization, migration, education, and event-context indicators from accessible records with safeguards.

core_tasks.label: Behavioral and criminological profiling
core_tasks.prompt: Run behavioral and criminological profiling. Identify repeat named persons, habitual patterns, modus operandi indicators, risk factors, and evidence-bound safeguards.

core_tasks.label: Proactive crime prevention intelligence
core_tasks.prompt: Run proactive crime prevention intelligence. Identify early warnings, forecast hotspots, repeat-crime pressure, resource deployment priorities, and transparent evidence trails.

solution_framework.title: Conversational Crime Intelligence Interface
solution_framework.objective: Natural-language, context-aware querying of FIRs, accused, victims, locations, investigation status, and history.

solution_framework.title: Criminal Network and Relationship Analysis
solution_framework.objective: Reveal links between suspects, victims, locations, crime incidents, accounts, and money trails.

solution_framework.title: Crime Pattern and Trend Analytics
solution_framework.objective: Detect repeat patterns across time, geography, crime type, modus operandi, events, and clusters.

solution_framework.title: Sociological Crime Insights
solution_framework.objective: Analyze aggregate demographic and social-context fields while avoiding protected-class causation claims.
capabilities: Urbanization, migration, education, and event indicators

solution_framework.title: Criminology-Based Offender Profiling
solution_framework.objective: Build evidence-bound named-person profiles from accessible case linkages without autonomous guilt assessment.

solution_framework.title: Investigator Decision Support
solution_framework.objective: Provide automated case summaries, timelines, similar cases, and human-review investigation leads.

solution_framework.title: Financial Crime and Transaction Link Analysis
solution_framework.objective: Detect high-value transfers, structuring, circular flows, mule accounts, and account-link networks.

solution_framework.title: Crime Forecasting and Early Warning
solution_framework.objective: Generate district-level planning forecasts and early-warning messages for repeat hotspot pressure.

solution_framework.title: Explainable AI and Transparent Analytics
solution_framework.objective: Return visible evidence, reasoning paths, audit hashes, and safeguards for accountable law-enforcement use.

solution_framework.title: Secure Role-Based Access and Governance
solution_framework.objective: Protect sensitive records with RBAC, district/sensitivity filtering, rate limits, revocation, and traceability.

governance.traceability: Audit log with hash-chain integrity checks

forecast.answer:
### 🛡️ Proactive Crime Prevention & Tactical Intelligence

Scanned **39** incident(s) for preventative recommendations.

**Workload & Risk Highlights:**
- **Top Planning Categories**: Cyber Financial Fraud (23), Assault (4), Chain Snatching (4), House Breaking (4), Vehicle Theft (4)
- **District Workload Leaders**: Bengaluru Urban (23), Dakshina Kannada (4), Dharwad (4), Mysuru (4), Udupi (4)
- **ML Risk Zones**: Bengaluru Urban / Cyber Financial Fraud score 100 (high); Dakshina Kannada / Assault score 77 (high); Mysuru / House Breaking score 77 (high); Dharwad / Vehicle Theft score 59 (medium)
- **Proactive Alerts**: **1** emerging trend alert(s), **1** anomaly flag(s).

> **Deployment Directive:** Use these as deployment-planning signals and verify with local station intelligence before action.

Evidence references:
- 39 accessible aggregate record(s)

Suggested actions:
- Show suspect profile for next days
- Show criminal network for next days

Note: This is an investigative aid from stored records, not a determination of guilt.

network.answer:
### 🕸️ Criminal Relationship Network — Pooja Naik

**Summary of Accessible Links:**
- **FIR Links**: 2 (`BLR-CYB-043`, `BLR-CYB-042`)
- **Person Links**: 2 (`Prakash Kumar`, `Santosh Sharma`)
- **Account Links**: 4 (`IN-BLR-MULE-1001`, `IN-BLR-PRK-0001`, `IN-BLR-SAN-0002`, `IN-MYS-LAYER-2200`)
- **Transaction Links**: 3

**Strongest Money-Flow Edges:**
- `IN-BLR-SAN-0002` ➜ `IN-BLR-MULE-1001` | **INR 940,000** | Demo transfer: shared mule account across two FIRs.
- `IN-BLR-MULE-1001` ➜ `IN-MYS-LAYER-2200` | **INR 950,000** | Demo transfer: near-threshold layering transaction.
- `IN-BLR-PRK-0001` ➜ `IN-BLR-MULE-1001` | **INR 1,250,000** | Demo transfer: high-value movement after phishing complaint.

> **Compliance Note:** This is relationship intelligence from accessible records, not a determination of guilt.

Evidence references:
- BLR-CYB-043 | Bengaluru Urban | under_review
- BLR-CYB-042 | Bengaluru Urban | open

- Show money trail for Pooja Naik
- Show suspect profile for Pooja Naik

overview.answer:
I am KSP AI Crime Intelligence Assistant.
My motto is: serve investigators with evidence-first intelligence, protect sensitive records, and never infer guilt.

What I can do:
- Search FIRs, case numbers, suspects, victims, complainants, police stations, districts, and status.
- Build suspect profiles, linked FIR summaries, case timelines, and similar-case leads.
- Analyze criminal networks, repeat-offender links, common associates, and relationship paths.
- Trace financial fraud flows, mule accounts, circular transfers, dead ends, bank/IFSC/branch/manager links.
- Discover crime patterns, hotspots, seasonal trends, MO clusters, and emerging threat signals.
- Summarize uploaded FIR copies and case files after Python extraction from PDF, DOC, DOCX, CSV, and Excel files.
- Support Kannada and English questions, translation, voice input, PDF export, RBAC, audit trails, and admin governance.

How to ask:
- "Find Ravi Kumar"
- "Who filed the complaint against Ravi Kumar?"
- "Show FIR BLR-001 details"
- "Top 10 theft cases in Bengaluru"
- "Show money trail for A1"
- "Open criminal network for Ravi Kumar"
- "Forecast hotspot risk by district"

I only answer from stored records your role can access. If the data is not stored or not authorized for your role, I will say so instead of guessing.
This system heading identifies the platform as Karnataka State Police Intelligent Systems By Jaswinzz Gowda.
safeguards: No crime records were queried for this non-crime control intent.
No external knowledge or unstored facts are used for this answer.
